compositional_truth_check.p1_yellow_pot: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter; soil appears dormant/barren.
compositional_truth_check.p2_black_pot: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter; soil appears dormant/barren.
compositional_truth_check.p3_black_pot: Present: Pothos specimen with single leaf and rabbit anchor.
compositional_truth_check.p4_silver_guest: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter; soil appears dormant/barren.

inventory_reconciliation.notes: The registry is largely unsupported by visual evidence. Only P3 retains a living specimen. P1, P2, and P4 are currently showing no signs of life, suggesting either dormancy, total senescence, or complete loss of the biological specimens.

plant_audit.p3: Single leaf Pothos, stable, white rabbit anchor present.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments present in P3; electronic component (IC chip) introduced in T-1 and remains in CURRENT.

temporal_deltas.t-2_to_t-1: Introduction of a small electronic component (IC chip) on the desk surface.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: Static; no further biological or structural changes observed.

visual_health_inference.p1_p2_p4: Dead/Lost or dormant. No photosynthetic activity detected.
visual_health_inference.p3: Stable. The single leaf appears turgid and healthy, though the plant is severely underdeveloped relative to a standard Pothos.

anomalies: Introduction of an electronic IC chip on the desk surface at T-1.
Persistent presence of eggshell fragments in P3 soil.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is in a state of extreme stasis. P1, P2, and P4 are effectively empty pots with no visible plant life. P3 is the only active specimen, maintaining a single leaf. The environment has been altered by the introduction of non-biological debris (eggshells and an IC chip), which serves no botanical function. The lack of growth or decay over the 5-day period suggests the remaining plant is in a state of suspended development or extreme slow-growth.
